text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan is training for her second Sprinters
Stakes, but this time, it's not only the race she's
preparing for.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Bro. About today's training...
choice_data_list: You want me to take pictures?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Big Sis. About today's training...
choice_data_list: You want me to take pictures?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah, that too. But also, is it okay if we end a
little early today?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll make up for the lost time by working extra
hard! Whaddya say?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've got an UmaTube vid I wanna upload today,
but I'm not done editing it yet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
This is the price I pay for having so much fun with
last night's back-to-back Umastagram and
Umatter streams!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's busy managing all of her different social
media accounts in preparation for the Cutie ♪
Derby. I'd love to lighten her load, but...
choice_data_list: Is there anything I can do to help?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: As long as we can end early, that's all I need!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
With that out of the way, let's get started with
today's training! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan completes the training we have
planned at an alarming pace and leaves with a
smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks like she's doing fine, but from what I
can tell, she has an awful lot on her plate. I hope
she really is all right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I get an unexpected visitor...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(Admire Vega. She's a year above Curren Chan in
the Twinkle Series, but she's also her roommate,
so I hear about her from time to time.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she has something to say, but this
strange silence continues... until she seems to
make up her mind.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I came to complain about Curren.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
She's been staying up all night recently, and it's
bothering me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
And it's annoying that she's always on her phone
or computer.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...It used to be that I couldn't get her to shut up,
but now she doesn't even say a word to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan is a perfectionist. She doesn't show
it on the outside, but it seems like she really has
been pushing herself too hard...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's your job to manage her, isn't it? Do you call
this doing your job? What are you gonna do if she
works herself sick and collapses?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear me?! I'm not worried—these are
complaints!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...Anyway, as her trainer, you need to take better
care of her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega walks out... and I spot something
shiny on top of the shelf by the door.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It probably belongs to Admire Vega. I have to go
after her!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...In summary, unable to find Ayabe, you've come
to me, the leader of Rito Dorm?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I believe I grasp the situation. But, you know,
Ayabe's not the type to—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I get it now. That Ayabe is always so
indirect...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. Excuse me. I know Curren is your trainee,
but you are aware it's against the rules for trainers
to come into the dorm, right?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So you realize, then, that there's nothing more I
can do for you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...But, y'know, being dorm leader is much more
difficult than people make it out to be.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I might even end up nodding off for, say... ten
minutes.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...I'm actually worried about Curren too.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'll leave this to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I wait, but she doesn't answer. I don't hear a
single sound from inside her room...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's your job to manage her, isn't it? Do you call
this doing your job? What are you gonna do if she
works herself sick and collapses?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something might have happened to Curren Chan!
I swing the door open, and...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Someone there?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Someone there?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wait, Big Bro?! What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wait, Big Sis?! What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh... So Ayabe snuck you our dorm key, and even
Fuji was worried enough to let you in.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...I'm so lame.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But... I can't believe Ayabe would pretend to
forget her key like that. What a roundabout way
to go about it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm sorry for worrying you. I'm doing just
fine, though!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm sorry for worrying you. I'm doing just
fine, though!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking around her room, I can see that, while it's
clean enough at first glance, there are a lot of
energy drink and coffee cans hidden out of
sight...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's also a pile of cardboard boxes labeled
"For Distribution". It looks like she's doing even
more work than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Judging by your face, you want to tell me not to
push myself so hard.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But it's not that big of a deal. I'm just a liiittle
sleepy after staying up late editing UmaTube
vids. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
At least, that's what I want to say, but... maybe I
am in a bit over my head.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
This was my plan, but I didn't realize how much
time classes, training, and the constant social
media updates would take! I'm worn out!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But still... Please let me do this.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But still... Please let me do this.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
My goal is still a long, long way off. I can't stop
until I get there.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I refuse to compromise or give up on my dream!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, remember what you told me at the shrine
back around New Year's?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, remember what you told me at the shrine
back around New Year's?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You told me you were sure I could be a champion.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Don't worry. I won't let it affect my races. After all... this is something I need to do for myself. I won't ask you to get involved.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'll help!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I know you can do it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I know you can do it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
This is it—the make-or-break point. So please, let
me do this!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Please?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be reckless. I'm gonna push myself to
the brink... But I won't let anyone see how much
it's wearing me out.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Are you sure that's okay with you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Are you sure that's okay with you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's my job as her trainer to stop her. If she
breaks down here, she'll lose everything. On top
of that, I do really want her to rest from the
bottom of my heart, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From everything Curren Chan and I have been
through together, I know that the best thing I can
do to support her is to believe in her.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Big Bro. I'll definitely pull this off!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Big Sis. I'll definitely pull this off!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Brooo! How was I?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Siiis! How was I?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪ Keep praising me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Curren Chan is running at the
training course with a big smile and her full
sharpness on display, showing me that she's
pushed through the worst of it.
